contract.requiredDnaContract: At least one tumor DNA row and one matched normal DNA row sharing pair_id, with FASTQ pairs, BAM+BAI, or CRAM+CRAI.
contract.rnaContract: Optional RNA_FASTQ rows can be included for expression context, but DNA tumor-normal rows are required for HRD mechanics.
contract.referenceContract: Diana DNA rows should use the same reference_id/reference_path/reference_fai_path/reference_dict_path unless a reviewer approves a build-specific split.

warnings: Copy the template and replace placeholder paths when Dinah's files arrive.

handoffSteps.name: refresh_template_and_contract
handoffSteps.boundary: Template readiness only; no Diana files are validated.

handoffSteps.name: copy_and_fill_samplesheet
handoffSteps.success_evidence: Tumor and matched normal DNA rows contain real local paths, reference metadata, and shared pair_id.
handoffSteps.boundary: Do not leave template placeholder paths or pending metadata in strict mode.

handoffSteps.name: cloud_upload_permission_gate
handoffSteps.command_or_action: Record whether human-data cloud upload is allowed before S3, Batch, or external transfer.
handoffSteps.success_evidence: Reviewer-visible approval note in samplesheet notes/caveat or analysis packet.
handoffSteps.boundary: No AWS Batch or S3 upload for human data until permission is explicit.

handoffSteps.name: strict_validate_diana_inputs
handoffSteps.boundary: Passing validation proves files and pairing are staged; it is not an HRD result.

handoffSteps.name: stage_diana_raw_analysis_packet
handoffSteps.boundary: Staging records inputs and planned commands; compute lanes still require review.

handoffSteps.name: refresh_rosalind_raw_intake_packet
handoffSteps.boundary: The packet should remain no-call until downstream feature lanes pass.

handoffSteps.name: refresh_readiness_triage
handoffSteps.boundary: Triage should show file-arrival blockers closed only after strict validation passes.

handoffSteps.name: route_first_compute_lane
handoffSteps.command_or_action: Use WGS rows for WGS feature lanes; use WES rows for small-variant mechanics; keep RNA as context.
handoffSteps.success_evidence: A reviewed lane-specific command plan in results/diana_raw_analysis/<analysis_id>/recompute_command_plan.csv.
handoffSteps.boundary: Do not compute scarHRD, CHORD, SBS3, or HRDetect-style results until their adapters and policies are locked.

interpretationBoundary: Handoff planning does not validate actual files or produce HRD evidence; strict validation and downstream feature lanes must pass before interpretation.
